paymentScreen.paidTitle: This Bill Has Been Paid in Full
paymentScreen.paidDesc: Official payment proof has been recorded in the KosanKu system and sent to your and the owner's notifications.
paymentScreen.autoPaymentDesc: By choosing Xendit automated payment, your bill status will change to Paid instantly right after the transfer is verified by the Xendit server.
paymentScreen.alreadyPaidAlertMsg: This bill has already been paid in full.
paymentScreen.selectMethodAlertMsg: Please select a payment method first.
paymentScreen.xenditAutoAlertMsg: Open Xendit official payment page for {{amount}}? You can select QRIS, Virtual Account, or E-Wallet there. Bill status will be paid automatically after you pay.

paymentScreen.xenditErrorMsg: An error occurred while contacting the Xendit server. Ensure your internet connection is stable.
paymentScreen.manualErrorMsg: Manual payment failed to process, try again.
paymentScreen.manualSuccessMsg: Your manual payment is awaiting confirmation from the owner.
paymentScreen.modalCheckoutDesc: Please complete your payment in the browser via your selected QRIS, Virtual Account, or E-Wallet.
paymentScreen.modalPolling: System is monitoring your payment status from Xendit in Real-Time... Once paid, this page will close automatically and the bill will be paid in full!
